\tzpentry{ID3947}{Angular Velocity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3947 introduces Angular Velocity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\n\\Omega^\\top = \\nabla \\cdot F_t \\quad \\text{(Trawinistic Omega Field Divergence)}\n\\]
